title: Rare-Earth Miner Lynas Posts Earnings Surge, Misses Expectations
description: Lynas Rare Earths Ltd. reported a surge in profit for the six months to the end of December, on the back of stronger production and improved prices for its main product, but fell short of analyst expectations heightened by the global focus on metal supply chains.
content: Lynas Rare Earths Ltd. reported a surge in profit for the six months to the end of December, on the back of stronger production and improved prices for its main product, but fell short of analyst expectations heightened by the global focus on metal supply chains.
